message:
fix: harden mixed-mode command parsing and synchronize token persistence (#9444)

- Extract commands from LLM responses using robust regex matching
  instead of brittle "CMD: " string prefix. Now handles markdown code
  blocks, "Command:" prefix (case-insensitive), and bare kubectl/helm/oc
  commands with deduplication.

- Serialize saveTokenUsage file I/O with a dedicated tokenFileMux so
  concurrent goroutines cannot clobber each other during the
  read-modify-write cycle.

Fixes #9440, Fixes #9441

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,6 +123,7 @@ type Server struct {
 
 	// Token tracking
 	tokenMux         sync.RWMutex
+	tokenFileMux     sync.Mutex // serializes file I/O in saveTokenUsage to prevent race (#9441)
 	sessionStart     time.Time
 	sessionTokensIn  int64
 	sessionTokensOut int64
